excerpt: The official programme page for MSc Security and Resilience: Science and Technology (MSc) lists Round 6 opening on 2026-06-19 and closing on 2026-08-20. Source: https://www.imperial.ac.uk/study/courses/postgraduate-taught/2026/security-resilience-science-technology/ We operate a staged admissions process with several application rounds throughout the year. Apply by 23.59 (UK time) on the closing date of an application round, to ensure you receive a response on your application by the relevant decision date. Round 1 Business School courses only. Round 2 Applications open on Monday 29 September 2025 Applications close on Wednesday 7 January 2026 Decision by Wednesday 4 March 2026 Round 3 Applications open on Thursday 8 January 2026 Applications close on Wednesday 11 March 2026 Decision by Wednesday 6 May 2026 Round 4 Applications open on Thursday 12 March 2026 Applications close on Wednesday 29 April 2026 Decision by Thursday 2 July 2026 Round 5 Applications open on Thursday 30 April 2026 Applications close on Thursday 18 June 2026 Decision by Thursday 16 July 2026 Round 6 Applications open on Friday 19 June 2026 Applications close on Thursday 20 August 2026 Decision by Wednesday 2 September 2026 We recommend applying as early as you can – we cannot guarantee that places will be available, or that courses will remain open, in later rounds. Students who require a student visa to study at Imperial should apply no later than 18 June 2026 to allow for CAS processing. Learn more about application rounds for Master's courses .
matchedTextBefore: Deepen your understanding of the science and cutting-edge technologies that underpin global security.
